nasb.text: Afterward all the sons of Israel came near, and he commanded them to do everything that the Lord had spoken to him on Mount Sinai.

esv.text: Afterward all the people of Israel came near, and he commanded them all that the Lord had spoken with him in Mount Sinai.

cnv.text: 以後，全體以色列人都近前來，摩西就把耶和華在西奈山上與他所說的一切話都吩咐他們。

ccb.text: 之后，所有的以色列人都来到他面前，他就把耶和华在西奈山上的吩咐都告诉他们。
